title: elaeocarpus gagnepainii
intro: Elaeocarpus gagnepainii, also known as the Gagnepain's elaeocarpus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Elaeocarpus gagnepainii are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
